entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The crop species Cicer arietinum in which albinism was studied

entities.name: ALBINISM
entities.description: A trait characterized by the lack of pigment, resulting in albino plants that die before seed set

entities.name: GAMMA RAY TREATMENT
entities.description: A method using 30 kR of gamma rays to induce mutations in the M0 generation

entities.name: AL-1
entities.description: A recessive gene that controls the albinism trait in chickpea

entities.name: CELLULAR LEVEL
entities.description: The scale at which the phenomenon of albinism was studied

relationships.description: Gamma ray treatment induced the albinism trait
The al-1 gene controls the albinism trait
The al-1 gene is present in chickpea
Albinism was studied at the cellular level
